name: @voasx/p2p-video
description: 基于 WebRTC、Rust 和 React 的一发多收摄像头共享应用

scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names server,web "cargo run --manifest-path apps/server/Cargo.toml" "bun run --cwd apps/web dev"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd apps/web build && cargo build --manifest-path apps/server/Cargo.toml --release
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd apps/web lint && cargo clippy --manifest-path apps/server/Cargo.toml --all-targets -- -D warnings
scripts.test: bun run --cwd apps/web test && cargo test --manifest-path apps/server/Cargo.toml
scripts.verify: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run test && bun run --cwd apps/web build
